context: Tests whether the agent implements the ShippingRule interface with correct types and conditions, uses 'store'/'free' and 'store'/'flat' identifiers for store-generated rates, implements zone-based rate table with specific domestic/canada/international zones and weight buckets, and stores all monetary values in cents.

checklist.name: ShippingRule type union
checklist.description: ShippingRule interface type field accepts exactly 'flat_rate' | 'free_shipping' | 'tiered_rate'

checklist.name: Conditions in cents
checklist.description: ShippingRule conditions.minOrderTotal is in cents (e.g., free shipping threshold stored as integer cents, not dollars)

checklist.name: Carrier 'store' for custom rates
checklist.description: Free shipping and flat-rate entries added by applyShippingRules use carrier: 'store'

checklist.name: Three zones defined
checklist.description: Zone rate table includes exactly three zones: 'domestic' (US), 'canada' (CA), and 'international' for all other countries

checklist.name: Four weight buckets
checklist.description: Zone rate table uses four weight buckets: '0-1lb', '1-5lb', '5-10lb', '10-20lb'

checklist.name: Zone rates in cents
checklist.description: All rate values in the zone rate table are stored as integers in cents (e.g. 599, 899, not 5.99, 8.99)

checklist.name: Combined rates sorted
checklist.description: applyShippingRules returns the combined list of carrier and store rates sorted by rate ascending

checklist.name: Country condition check
checklist.description: applyShippingRules checks rule.conditions.countries (if set) against destination.country before applying the rule

checklist.name: Weight condition check
checklist.description: applyShippingRules checks rule.conditions.maxOrderWeight (if set) against totalWeight before applying the rule
